title: Here Comes the Rain Again
album: Sounds of the Eighties: The Rolling Stone Collection 1983–1985
why_this_song: Here Comes the Rain Again by Eurythmics (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "I want to walk in the open wind"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Here comes the rain again"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "I want to talk like lovers do"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Falling on my head like a memory"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Falling on my head like a memory"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rain" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rain" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Raining in my hand like a tragedy

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Falling on my head like a memory
Here it goes again, here it goes again

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Here Comes the Rain Again" was released in 1983. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Here Comes the Rain Again" foi lançada em 1983. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
